data.name: Colphne

weaponImprint.name: .380 Curva
weaponImprint.trait: Basic attack range is increased by 1 tile, gains 1 point of Confectance Index after attacking.
weaponImprint.effect: After dealing damage, the next active healing is increased by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. If an allied unit goes into Stability Break, the next active healing additionally restores 1/1/1/1/2/2 points of stability index.

data.effects: Although she often appears cheerful and enthusiastic, her face can sometimes take on a completely different, cold expression. The syringe in her hand—is it meant to save lives, or take them?

skills.name: Quick Reaction
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Medical Contingency
skills.description: When an enemy unit within range receives targeted damage from an allied unit, prioritizes performing 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack and 3 points of stability damage to them, and applies [effect:90e40fd3-e06c-4dca-aa63-464cf6e0c9f7] to the allied unit for 2 turns. Gains 1 point of Confectance Index. This can be triggered once per turn. When applying an active heal to an allied unit, if the target is in Stability Break, additionally restores 2 points of stability index. Cooldown: 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Stability index recovery increases by 2 points.

skills.name: Crisis Aid
skills.description: Selects 1 allied target within 6 tiles, restoring their HP equal to 100% of attack and applies [effect:a8794e8b-ebb5-4c04-8f8a-ea7497c112d5] and [effect:45a4686b-80dd-401d-991c-aed564cb0ca9] to them for 1 turn. Gains 1 point of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 allied target within 6 tiles, restoring their HP equal to 100% of attack and applies [effect:a8794e8b-ebb5-4c04-8f8a-ea7497c112d5] and [effect:45a4686b-80dd-401d-991c-aed564cb0ca9] to them for 1 turn. If this fully restores the target's HP, applies 1 random buff to them for 2 turns. Gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If the target's HP is fully restored after healing, randomly grant it 1 buff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Battlefield Glow
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles, dealing Hydro damage equal to 130% of attack and restores HP equal to 100% of attack to the allied target with the lowest HP.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles, dealing Hydro damage equal to 130% of attack. Additionally, restores HP equal to 100% of attack to the allied unit with the lowest HP. Gains 1 additional use of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] this turn.

skills.name: Emergency Treatment
skills.description: Selects 1 allied target within 8 tiles, restoring their HP equal to 140% of attack and 4 points of stability, cleansing 2 debuffs from them, and removing [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] and [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3] effects.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 allied target within 8 tiles, restoring HP equal to 150% of attack and 4 points of stability, cleansing 2 debuffs, alongside removing [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] and [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3] effects.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Selects 1 allied target within 8 tiles, restoring HP equal to 150% of attack and 5 points of stability, cleansing 2 debuffs alongside removing [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] and [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3] effects.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Healing multiplier is increased by 10%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Increases Stability Index recovery by 1 point.

keys.effect: Before using a single target active heal, cleanses 1 random debuff from the target.
When Colphne performs [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], the allied unit performing targeted attack recovers HP equal to 50% of attack and 1 point of stability.
The active skill Crisis Aid applies [effect:67f08088-4326-4711-a4eb-fda93220f156] and [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a] to the target for 1 turn.
If an allied target enters Stability Break after being attacked, gain [effect:968e9913-e847-462c-be10-87bc8fc0f827] for 1 turn for self.
The effects of the active skill Battlefield Glow is enhanced. It also recovers HP to allied targets within 3 tiles.
When the HP of the user is above 80%, increases their attack by 10%.
Randomly cleanse 1 debuff from the target after healing.
When using active heals on targets below 50% HP, increases the healing effect by 20%.

vertebrae.effect: If the target's HP is fully restored after healing, randomly grant it 1 buff for 2 turns.

doll.name: Colphne
doll.effects: Although she often appears cheerful and enthusiastic, her face can sometimes take on a completely different, cold expression. The syringe in her hand—is it meant to save lives, or take them?

imagoforms.effect: Healing effects received by allies with 50% or lower HP is increased by 8%. Does not stack.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Hydro damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 4%, maximum of 3 stacks. This effect's potency is progressively reduced by 1% each time a new stack is applied.
Attack and max HP is increased by 4%.
This unit's healing effects are increased by 12%.
